name: com.tecvoodoo.mcp-tools
description: Custom MCP tool extensions for Claude AI Game Developer. 54 tool groups covering Flexalon, PWB, RayFire, MagicaCloth2, FinalIK, AssetInventory, MalbersAC, QuestForge, RetargetPro, RopeToolkit, HeathenPhysics, HeathenBallistics, Feel, DamageNumbersPro, Cinemachine, AnimationRigging, ALINE, MasterAudio, A*Pathfinding, DialogueSystem, SensorToolkit, UCC, BehaviorDesigner, DOTween, UnityEntities, UnityPhysics, BroAudio, Koreographer, PMG, Maestro, DryWetMIDI, FMOD, Chunity, Naninovel, AdventureCreator, TextAnimator, InkIntegration, 2.5DTerrain, 2.5DBridgeBuilder, DecalCollider, TextureStudio, AINavigation, Animancer, JuicyActions, BoingKit, MudBun, Lumen, Timeflow, uLipSync, TechnieColliderCreator2, MKEdgeDetection, RealTimeWeatherPro, UltimateTerrain, and PressE PRO 2. Tools auto-activate via MCPToolsDefineManager when target assets are detected.
